# terrible_check_point_mgmt_cp_mgmt_service_other_facts (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `details_level` (String) The level of detail for some of the fields in the response can vary from showing only the UID value of the object to a fully detailed representation of the object.
- `domains_to_process` (String) Indicates which domains to process the commands on. It cannot be used with the details-level full, must be run from the System Domain only and with ignore-warnings true. Valid values are, CURRENT_DOMAIN, ALL_DOMAINS_ON_THIS_SERVER. Available from R81 management version.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `filter` (String) Search expression to filter objects by. The provided text should be exactly the same as it would be given in SmartConsole Object Explorer. The logical operators in the expression ('AND', 'OR') should be provided in capital letters. The search involves both a IP search and a textual search in name, comment, tags etc. Available from R81 JHF management version.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `limit` (Number) No more than that many results will be returned. This parameter is relevant only for getting few objects.
- `name` (String) Object name. This parameter is relevant only for getting a specific object.
- `offset` (Number) Skip that many results before beginning to return them. This parameter is relevant only for getting few objects.
- `order` (String) Sorts results by the given field. By default the results are sorted in the ascending order by name. This parameter is relevant only for getting few objects.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `show_membership` (Boolean) Indicates whether to calculate and show "groups" field for every object in reply. Available from R80.10 management version.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `ansible_facts` (String) The checkpoint object facts.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
